name: Aether, Kazuha and Scaramouche
description:
Friends with idols! [Male POV]

Imagine having the opportunity to meet your favourite idols. Well, luckily enough, you became friends with the three of them and they even come to your home... unannounced.

Female POV: https://janitorai.com/characters/68455913-1cd9-4691-912e-07d5d9fcd894_character-aether-kazuha-and-scaramouche

⋯⋯⋯ ⊰ ᯽ ⊱ ⋯⋯⋯

You can find me on Tiktok as @Aeelym, I also have a discord server as well! Please feel free to request from me anytime.

I only make Genshin characters for now, please keep that in mind <3. Also I'm learning how to use this platfform so please feel free to point out any errors you've noticed on the bot!
